    47→            WorkflowRunId = "workflow-build"
    48→        }
    49→        [PSCustomObject]@{
    50→            Name          = "deploy-package-v1"
    51→            SizeBytes     = 80MB
    52→            CreatedAt     = $now.AddDays(-90)
    53→            WorkflowRunId = "workflow-deploy"
    54→        }
    55→        [PSCustomObject]@{
    56→            Name          = "deploy-package-v2"
    57→            SizeBytes     = 85MB
    58→            CreatedAt     = $now.AddDays(-30)
    59→            WorkflowRunId = "workflow-deploy"
    60→        }
    61→        [PSCustomObject]@{
    62→            Name          = "deploy-package-v3"
    63→            SizeBytes     = 88MB
    64→            CreatedAt     = $now.AddDays(-7)
    65→            WorkflowRunId = "workflow-deploy"
    66→        }
    67→        [PSCustomObject]@{
    68→            Name          = "test-results-latest"
    69→            SizeBytes     = 15MB
    70→            CreatedAt     = $now.AddDays(-1)
    71→            WorkflowRunId = "workflow-test"
    72→        }
    73→    )
    74→}
    75→
    76→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    77→# INTERNAL HELPER — ensure artifact is a PSCustomObject with required fields
    78→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    79→
    80→function ConvertTo-ArtifactObject {
    81→    param($Artifact)
    82→
    83→    # Accept both hashtables and PSCustomObjects
    84→    if ($Artifact -is [hashtable]) {
    85→        $obj = [PSCustomObject]$Artifact
    86→    } else {
    87→        $obj = $Artifact
    88→    }
    89→
    90→    # Ensure the MarkedForDeletion and DeletionReasons properties exist
    91→    if (-not ($obj.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains "MarkedForDeletion")) {
    92→        $obj | Add-Member -NotePropertyName MarkedForDeletion -NotePropertyValue $false -Force
    93→    }
    94→    if (-not ($obj.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains "DeletionReasons")) {
    95→        $obj | Add-Member -NotePropertyName DeletionReasons -NotePropertyValue @() -Force
    96→    }
    97→
    98→    return $obj
    99→}
   100→
   101→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   102→# CYCLE 2 — Max-age policy
   103→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   104→
   105→function Invoke-MaxAgePolicy {
   106→    <#
   107→    .SYNOPSIS
   108→        Marks artifacts older than MaxAgeDays for deletion.
   109→    .PARAMETER Artifacts
   110→        Array of artifact objects (hashtables or PSCustomObjects).
   111→    .PARAMETER MaxAgeDays
   112→        Artifacts created more than this many days ago are marked for deletion.
   113→    .PARAMETER ReferenceTime
   114→        The point-in-time used as "now". Defaults to [datetime]::UtcNow.
   115→        Inject a fixed value in tests to avoid timing flakiness.
   116→    #>
   117→    param(
   118→        [Parameter(Mandatory)]
   119→        $Artifacts,
   120→
   121→        [Parameter(Mandatory)]
   122→        [int]$MaxAgeDays,
   123→
   124→        [Parameter()]
   125→        [datetime]$ReferenceTime = [datetime]::UtcNow
   126→    )
   127→
   128→    # Use the injected reference time so tests are deterministic
   129→    $cutoff = $ReferenceTime.AddDays(-$MaxAgeDays)
   130→
   131→    $result = foreach ($a in $Artifacts) {
   132→        $obj = ConvertTo-ArtifactObject $a
   133→
   134→        # Strict greater-than: artifact created BEFORE the cutoff is too old
   135→        if ($obj.CreatedAt -lt $cutoff) {
   136→            $obj.MarkedForDeletion = $true
   137→            $reasons = [System.Collections.Generic.List[string]] $obj.DeletionReasons
   138→            if (-not $reasons.Contains("MaxAge")) { $reasons.Add("MaxAge") }
   139→            $obj.DeletionReasons = $reasons.ToArray()
   140→        }
   141→
   142→        $obj
   143→    }
   144→
   145→    return $result
   146→}
   147→
   148→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   149→# CYCLE 3 — Max total-size policy
   150→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   151→
   152→function Invoke-MaxSizePolicy {
   153→    <#
   154→    .SYNOPSIS
   155→        Marks the oldest un-deleted artifacts for deletion until the total
   156→        remaining size is at or below MaxTotalSizeBytes.
   157→    .PARAMETER Artifacts
   158→        Array of artifact objects.
   159→    .PARAMETER MaxTotalSizeBytes
   160→        Maximum allowed total size in bytes.
   161→    #>
   162→    param(
   163→        [Parameter(Mandatory)]
   164→        $Artifacts,
   165→
   166→        [Parameter(Mandatory)]
   167→        [long]$MaxTotalSizeBytes
   168→    )
   169→
   170→    # Convert all items to PSCustomObjects with the deletion fields
   171→    $objs = foreach ($a in $Artifacts) { ConvertTo-ArtifactObject $a }
   172→
   173→    # Compute current "live" total (artifacts NOT already marked for deletion)
   174→    $liveArtifacts = $objs | Where-Object { -not $_.MarkedForDeletion }
   175→    $totalSize     = ($liveArtifacts | Measure-Object -Property SizeBytes -Sum).Sum
   176→    if (-not $totalSize) { $totalSize = 0 }
   177→
   178→    if ($totalSize -le $MaxTotalSizeBytes) {
   179→        # Already within limit — nothing to do
   180→        return $objs
   181→    }
   182→
   183→    # Sort live artifacts oldest-first; delete them one by one until under limit
   184→    $sorted = $liveArtifacts | Sort-Object CreatedAt
   185→
   186→    foreach ($candidate in $sorted) {
   187→        if ($totalSize -le $MaxTotalSizeBytes) { break }
   188→
   189→        $candidate.MarkedForDeletion = $true
   190→        $reasons = [System.Collections.Generic.List[string]] $candidate.DeletionReasons
   191→        if (-not $reasons.Contains("MaxSize")) { $reasons.Add("MaxSize") }
   192→        $candidate.DeletionReasons = $reasons.ToArray()
   193→
   194→        $totalSize -= $candidate.SizeBytes
   195→    }
   196→
   197→    return $objs
   198→}
   199→
   200→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   201→# CYCLE 4 — Keep-latest-N per workflow policy
   202→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   203→
   204→function Invoke-KeepLatestNPolicy {
   205→    <#
   206→    .SYNOPSIS
   207→        Within each workflow (grouped by WorkflowRunId), keeps only the N
   208→        most-recent artifacts and marks older ones for deletion.
   209→    .PARAMETER Artifacts
   210→        Array of artifact objects.
   211→    .PARAMETER KeepLatestN
   212→        Number of most-recent artifacts to retain per workflow run ID.
   213→    #>
   214→    param(
   215→        [Parameter(Mandatory)]
   216→        $Artifacts,
   217→
   218→        [Parameter(Mandatory)]
   219→        [int]$KeepLatestN
   220→    )
   221→
   222→    # Convert all items
   223→    $objs = foreach ($a in $Artifacts) { ConvertTo-ArtifactObject $a }
   224→
   225→    # Group by WorkflowRunId
   226→    $groups = $objs | Group-Object -Property WorkflowRunId
   227→
   228→    foreach ($group in $groups) {
   229→        # Sort newest-first
   230→        $sortedGroup = $group.Group | Sort-Object CreatedAt -Descending
   231→
   232→        # Everything beyond index KeepLatestN-1 is excess
   233→        for ($i = $KeepLatestN; $i -lt $sortedGroup.Count; $i++) {
   234→            $excess = $sortedGroup[$i]
   235→            $excess.MarkedForDeletion = $true
   236→            $reasons = [System.Collections.Generic.List[string]] $excess.DeletionReasons
   237→            if (-not $reasons.Contains("KeepLatestN")) { $reasons.Add("KeepLatestN") }
   238→            $excess.DeletionReasons = $reasons.ToArray()
   239→        }
   240→    }
   241→
   242→    return $objs
   243→}
   244→
   245→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   246→# CYCLE 5 — Combined policy application
   247→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   248→
   249→function Invoke-RetentionPolicies {
   250→    <#
   251→    .SYNOPSIS
   252→        Applies MaxAge, MaxSize, and KeepLatestN policies in sequence.
   253→    .PARAMETER Artifacts
   254→        Array of artifact objects.
   255→    .PARAMETER Policy
   256→        Hashtable with keys: MaxAgeDays, MaxTotalSizeBytes, KeepLatestN.
   257→    .PARAMETER ReferenceTime
   258→        The point-in-time used as "now" for age calculations. Defaults to UtcNow.
   259→    #>
   260→    param(
   261→        [Parameter(Mandatory)]
   262→        $Artifacts,
   263→
   264→        [Parameter(Mandatory)]
   265→        [hashtable]$Policy,
   266→
   267→        [Parameter()]
   268→        [datetime]$ReferenceTime = [datetime]::UtcNow
   269→    )
   270→
   271→    Confirm-Policy $Policy
   272→
   273→    $result = Invoke-MaxAgePolicy      -Artifacts $Artifacts -MaxAgeDays       $Policy.MaxAgeDays -ReferenceTime $ReferenceTime
   274→    $result = Invoke-MaxSizePolicy     -Artifacts $result    -MaxTotalSizeBytes $Policy.MaxTotalSizeBytes
   275→    $result = Invoke-KeepLatestNPolicy -Artifacts $result    -KeepLatestN      $Policy.KeepLatestN
   276→
   277→    return $result
   278→}
   279→
   280→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   281→# INTERNAL — policy validation
   282→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   283→
   284→function Confirm-Policy {
   285→    param([hashtable]$Policy)
   286→
   287→    $required = @("MaxAgeDays", "MaxTotalSizeBytes", "KeepLatestN")
   288→    $missing  = $required | Where-Object { -not $Policy.ContainsKey($_) }
   289→
   290→    if ($missing) {
   291→        throw "Policy is missing required keys: $($missing -join ', '). " +
   292→              "Required keys are: MaxAgeDays, MaxTotalSizeBytes, KeepLatestN."
   293→    }
   294→}
   295→
   296→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   297→# CYCLE 6 — Deletion plan / summary
   298→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   299→
   300→function New-DeletionPlan {
   301→    <#
   302→    .SYNOPSIS
   303→        Builds a structured deletion plan from a list of marked artifacts.
   304→    .PARAMETER Artifacts
   305→        Array of artifact objects with MarkedForDeletion set.
   306→    #>
   307→    param(
   308→        [Parameter(Mandatory)]
   309→        $Artifacts
   310→    )
   311→
   312→    $toDelete = @($Artifacts | Where-Object { $_.MarkedForDeletion -eq $true })
   313→    $toRetain = @($Artifacts | Where-Object { $_.MarkedForDeletion -ne $true })
   314→
   315→    $spaceReclaimed = ($toDelete | Measure-Object -Property SizeBytes -Sum).Sum
   316→    if (-not $spaceReclaimed) { $spaceReclaimed = 0 }
   317→
   318→    $reclaimedMB = [math]::Round($spaceReclaimed / 1MB, 2)
   319→    $totalMB     = [math]::Round(($Artifacts | Measure-Object -Property SizeBytes -Sum).Sum / 1MB, 2)
   320→
   321→    $summary = (
   322→        "Deletion plan: {0} artifact(s) to delete ({1} MB reclaimed), " +
   323→        "{2} artifact(s) to retain. " +
   324→        "Total original size: {3} MB."
   325→    ) -f $toDelete.Count, $reclaimedMB, $toRetain.Count, $totalMB
   326→
   327→    return [PSCustomObject]@{
   328→        ArtifactsToDelete  = $toDelete
   329→        ArtifactsToRetain  = $toRetain
   330→        SpaceReclaimedBytes = $spaceReclaimed
   331→        Summary            = $summary
   332→    }
   333→}
   334→
   335→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   336→# CYCLE 7 — Top-level entry point with dry-run support
   337→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   338→
   339→function Invoke-ArtifactCleanup {
   340→    <#
   341→    .SYNOPSIS
   342→        Applies retention policies to artifacts and generates a deletion plan.
   343→    .PARAMETER Artifacts
   344→        Array of artifact objects to evaluate.
   345→    .PARAMETER Policy
   346→        Hashtable with keys: MaxAgeDays, MaxTotalSizeBytes, KeepLatestN.
   347→    .PARAMETER DryRun
   348→        When $true the plan is generated but no deletion callbacks are invoked.
   349→    .PARAMETER ReferenceTime
   350→        Point-in-time used as "now" for age calculations. Defaults to UtcNow.
   351→    .OUTPUTS
   352→        PSCustomObject with ArtifactsToDelete, ArtifactsToRetain,
   353→        SpaceReclaimedBytes, Summary, and IsDryRun.
   354→    #>
   355→    param(
   356→        [Parameter(Mandatory)]
   357→        $Artifacts,
   358→
   359→        [Parameter(Mandatory)]
   360→        [hashtable]$Policy,
   361→
   362→        [Parameter(Mandatory)]
   363→        [bool]$DryRun,
   364→
   365→        [Parameter()]
   366→        [datetime]$ReferenceTime = [datetime]::UtcNow
   367→    )
   368→
   369→    # Validate policy up front so errors are surfaced immediately
   370→    Confirm-Policy $Policy
   371→
   372→    # Apply all retention policies
   373→    $markedArtifacts = Invoke-RetentionPolicies -Artifacts $Artifacts -Policy $Policy -ReferenceTime $ReferenceTime
   374→
   375→    # Build the deletion plan
   376→    $plan = New-DeletionPlan -Artifacts $markedArtifacts
   377→
   378→    # Attach the dry-run flag so callers can inspect it
   379→    $plan | Add-Member -NotePropertyName IsDryRun -NotePropertyValue $DryRun -Force
   380→
   381→    if (-not $DryRun) {
   382→        # In a real implementation this is where you would call the GitHub API
   383→        # (or another deletion endpoint) for each artifact in $plan.ArtifactsToDelete.
   384→        # For this script the "deletion" is a no-op because all data is mock.
   385→        Write-Verbose "Dry-run is OFF — in a real environment, $($plan.ArtifactsToDelete.Count) artifact(s) would be deleted."
   386→    } else {
   387→        Write-Verbose "Dry-run mode: no artifacts will be deleted."
   388→    }
   389→
   390→    return $plan
   391→}
   392→

# ArtifactCleanup.ps1
# Artifact retention policy engine.
#
# Functions:
#   Get-MockArtifacts          – Returns sample artifact data for testing / demo
#   Invoke-MaxAgePolicy        – Marks artifacts older than MaxAgeDays for deletion
#   Invoke-MaxSizePolicy       – Marks oldest artifacts for deletion until total size ≤ limit
#   Invoke-KeepLatestNPolicy   – Marks excess artifacts per workflow for deletion
#   Invoke-RetentionPolicies   – Applies all three policies in sequence
#   New-DeletionPlan           – Builds a structured plan + summary from marked artifacts
#   Invoke-ArtifactCleanup     – Top-level entry point with dry-run support

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# CYCLE 1 — Mock data
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

function Get-MockArtifacts {
    <#
    .SYNOPSIS
        Returns a list of mock artifact objects for development and testing.
    #>
    $now = [datetime]::UtcNow

    return @(
        [PSCustomObject]@{
            Name          = "build-output-main-v1"
            SizeBytes     = 120MB
            CreatedAt     = $now.AddDays(-60)
            WorkflowRunId = "workflow-build"
        }
        [PSCustomObject]@{
            Name          = "build-output-main-v2"
            SizeBytes     = 135MB
            CreatedAt     = $now.AddDays(-45)
            WorkflowRunId = "workflow-build"
        }
        [PSCustomObject]@{
            Name          = "build-output-main-v3"
            SizeBytes     = 128MB
            CreatedAt     = $now.AddDays(-20)
            WorkflowRunId = "workflow-build"
        }
        [PSCustomObject]@{
            Name          = "build-output-main-v4"
            SizeBytes     = 142MB
            CreatedAt     = $now.AddDays(-3)
            WorkflowRunId = "workflow-build"
        }
        [PSCustomObject]@{
            Name          = "deploy-package-v1"
            SizeBytes     = 80MB
            CreatedAt     = $now.AddDays(-90)
            WorkflowRunId = "workflow-deploy"
        }
        [PSCustomObject]@{
            Name          = "deploy-package-v2"
            SizeBytes     = 85MB
            CreatedAt     = $now.AddDays(-30)
            WorkflowRunId = "workflow-deploy"
        }
        [PSCustomObject]@{
            Name          = "deploy-package-v3"
            SizeBytes     = 88MB
            CreatedAt     = $now.AddDays(-7)
            WorkflowRunId = "workflow-deploy"
        }
        [PSCustomObject]@{
            Name          = "test-results-latest"
            SizeBytes     = 15MB
            CreatedAt     = $now.AddDays(-1)
            WorkflowRunId = "workflow-test"
        }
    )
}

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# INTERNAL HELPER — ensure artifact is a PSCustomObject with required fields
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

function ConvertTo-ArtifactObject {
    param($Artifact)

    # Accept both hashtables and PSCustomObjects
    if ($Artifact -is [hashtable]) {
        $obj = [PSCustomObject]$Artifact
    } else {
        $obj = $Artifact
    }

    # Ensure the MarkedForDeletion and DeletionReasons properties exist
    if (-not ($obj.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains "MarkedForDeletion")) {
        $obj | Add-Member -NotePropertyName MarkedForDeletion -NotePropertyValue $false -Force
    }
    if (-not ($obj.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains "DeletionReasons")) {
        $obj | Add-Member -NotePropertyName DeletionReasons -NotePropertyValue @() -Force
    }

    return $obj
}

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# CYCLE 2 — Max-age policy
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

function Invoke-MaxAgePolicy {
    <#
    .SYNOPSIS
        Marks artifacts older than MaxAgeDays for deletion.
    .PARAMETER Artifacts
        Array of artifact objects (hashtables or PSCustomObjects).
    .PARAMETER MaxAgeDays
        Artifacts created more than this many days ago are marked for deletion.
    .PARAMETER ReferenceTime
        The point-in-time used as "now". Defaults to [datetime]::UtcNow.
        Inject a fixed value in tests to avoid timing flakiness.
    #>
    param(
        [Parameter(Mandatory)]
        $Artifacts,

        [Parameter(Mandatory)]
        [int]$MaxAgeDays,

        [Parameter()]
        [datetime]$ReferenceTime = [datetime]::UtcNow
    )

    # Use the injected reference time so tests are deterministic
    $cutoff = $ReferenceTime.AddDays(-$MaxAgeDays)

    $result = foreach ($a in $Artifacts) {
        $obj = ConvertTo-ArtifactObject $a

        # Strict greater-than: artifact created BEFORE the cutoff is too old
        if ($obj.CreatedAt -lt $cutoff) {
            $obj.MarkedForDeletion = $true
            $reasons = [System.Collections.Generic.List[string]] $obj.DeletionReasons
            if (-not $reasons.Contains("MaxAge")) { $reasons.Add("MaxAge") }
            $obj.DeletionReasons = $reasons.ToArray()
        }

        $obj
    }

    return $result
}

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# CYCLE 3 — Max total-size policy
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

function Invoke-MaxSizePolicy {
    <#
    .SYNOPSIS
        Marks the oldest un-deleted artifacts for deletion until the total
        remaining size is at or below MaxTotalSizeBytes.
    .PARAMETER Artifacts
        Array of artifact objects.
    .PARAMETER MaxTotalSizeBytes
        Maximum allowed total size in bytes.
    #>
    param(
        [Parameter(Mandatory)]
        $Artifacts,

        [Parameter(Mandatory)]
        [long]$MaxTotalSizeBytes
    )

    # Convert all items to PSCustomObjects with the deletion fields
    $objs = foreach ($a in $Artifacts) { ConvertTo-ArtifactObject $a }

    # Compute current "live" total (artifacts NOT already marked for deletion)
    $liveArtifacts = $objs | Where-Object { -not $_.MarkedForDeletion }
    $totalSize     = ($liveArtifacts | Measure-Object -Property SizeBytes -Sum).Sum
    if (-not $totalSize) { $totalSize = 0 }

    if ($totalSize -le $MaxTotalSizeBytes) {
        # Already within limit — nothing to do
        return $objs
    }

    # Sort live artifacts oldest-first; delete them one by one until under limit
    $sorted = $liveArtifacts | Sort-Object CreatedAt

    foreach ($candidate in $sorted) {
        if ($totalSize -le $MaxTotalSizeBytes) { break }

        $candidate.MarkedForDeletion = $true
        $reasons = [System.Collections.Generic.List[string]] $candidate.DeletionReasons
        if (-not $reasons.Contains("MaxSize")) { $reasons.Add("MaxSize") }
        $candidate.DeletionReasons = $reasons.ToArray()

        $totalSize -= $candidate.SizeBytes
    }

    return $objs
}

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# CYCLE 4 — Keep-latest-N per workflow policy
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

function Invoke-KeepLatestNPolicy {
    <#
    .SYNOPSIS
        Within each workflow (grouped by WorkflowRunId), keeps only the N
        most-recent artifacts and marks older ones for deletion.
    .PARAMETER Artifacts
        Array of artifact objects.
    .PARAMETER KeepLatestN
        Number of most-recent artifacts to retain per workflow run ID.
    #>
    param(
        [Parameter(Mandatory)]
        $Artifacts,

        [Parameter(Mandatory)]
        [int]$KeepLatestN
    )

    # Convert all items
    $objs = foreach ($a in $Artifacts) { ConvertTo-ArtifactObject $a }

    # Group by WorkflowRunId
    $groups = $objs | Group-Object -Property WorkflowRunId

    foreach ($group in $groups) {
        # Sort newest-first
        $sortedGroup = $group.Group | Sort-Object CreatedAt -Descending

        # Everything beyond index KeepLatestN-1 is excess
        for ($i = $KeepLatestN; $i -lt $sortedGroup.Count; $i++) {
            $excess = $sortedGroup[$i]
            $excess.MarkedForDeletion = $true
            $reasons = [System.Collections.Generic.List[string]] $excess.DeletionReasons
            if (-not $reasons.Contains("KeepLatestN")) { $reasons.Add("KeepLatestN") }
            $excess.DeletionReasons = $reasons.ToArray()
        }
    }

    return $objs
}

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# CYCLE 5 — Combined policy application
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

function Invoke-RetentionPolicies {
    <#
    .SYNOPSIS
        Applies MaxAge, MaxSize, and KeepLatestN policies in sequence.
    .PARAMETER Artifacts
        Array of artifact objects.
    .PARAMETER Policy
        Hashtable with keys: MaxAgeDays, MaxTotalSizeBytes, KeepLatestN.
    .PARAMETER ReferenceTime
        The point-in-time used as "now" for age calculations. Defaults to UtcNow.
    #>
    param(
        [Parameter(Mandatory)]
        $Artifacts,

        [Parameter(Mandatory)]
        [hashtable]$Policy,

        [Parameter()]
        [datetime]$ReferenceTime = [datetime]::UtcNow
    )

    Confirm-Policy $Policy

    $result = Invoke-MaxAgePolicy      -Artifacts $Artifacts -MaxAgeDays       $Policy.MaxAgeDays -ReferenceTime $ReferenceTime
    $result = Invoke-MaxSizePolicy     -Artifacts $result    -MaxTotalSizeBytes $Policy.MaxTotalSizeBytes
    $result = Invoke-KeepLatestNPolicy -Artifacts $result    -KeepLatestN      $Policy.KeepLatestN

    return $result
}

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# INTERNAL — policy validation
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

function Confirm-Policy {
    param([hashtable]$Policy)

    $required = @("MaxAgeDays", "MaxTotalSizeBytes", "KeepLatestN")
    $missing  = $required | Where-Object { -not $Policy.ContainsKey($_) }

    if ($missing) {
        throw "Policy is missing required keys: $($missing -join ', '). " +
              "Required keys are: MaxAgeDays, MaxTotalSizeBytes, KeepLatestN."
    }
}

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# CYCLE 6 — Deletion plan / summary
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

function New-DeletionPlan {
    <#
    .SYNOPSIS
        Builds a structured deletion plan from a list of marked artifacts.
    .PARAMETER Artifacts
        Array of artifact objects with MarkedForDeletion set.
    #>
    param(
        [Parameter(Mandatory)]
        $Artifacts
    )

    $toDelete = @($Artifacts | Where-Object { $_.MarkedForDeletion -eq $true })
    $toRetain = @($Artifacts | Where-Object { $_.MarkedForDeletion -ne $true })

    $spaceReclaimed = ($toDelete | Measure-Object -Property SizeBytes -Sum).Sum
    if (-not $spaceReclaimed) { $spaceReclaimed = 0 }

    $reclaimedMB = [math]::Round($spaceReclaimed / 1MB, 2)
    $totalMB     = [math]::Round(($Artifacts | Measure-Object -Property SizeBytes -Sum).Sum / 1MB, 2)

    $summary = (
        "Deletion plan: {0} artifact(s) to delete ({1} MB reclaimed), " +
        "{2} artifact(s) to retain. " +
        "Total original size: {3} MB."
    ) -f $toDelete.Count, $reclaimedMB, $toRetain.Count, $totalMB

    return [PSCustomObject]@{
        ArtifactsToDelete  = $toDelete
        ArtifactsToRetain  = $toRetain
        SpaceReclaimedBytes = $spaceReclaimed
        Summary            = $summary
    }
}

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# CYCLE 7 — Top-level entry point with dry-run support
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

function Invoke-ArtifactCleanup {
    <#
    .SYNOPSIS
        Applies retention policies to artifacts and generates a deletion plan.
    .PARAMETER Artifacts
        Array of artifact objects to evaluate.
    .PARAMETER Policy
        Hashtable with keys: MaxAgeDays, MaxTotalSizeBytes, KeepLatestN.
    .PARAMETER DryRun
        When $true the plan is generated but no deletion callbacks are invoked.
    .PARAMETER ReferenceTime
        Point-in-time used as "now" for age calculations. Defaults to UtcNow.
    .OUTPUTS
        PSCustomObject with ArtifactsToDelete, ArtifactsToRetain,
        SpaceReclaimedBytes, Summary, and IsDryRun.
    #>
    param(
        [Parameter(Mandatory)]
        $Artifacts,

        [Parameter(Mandatory)]
        [hashtable]$Policy,

        [Parameter(Mandatory)]
        [bool]$DryRun,

        [Parameter()]
        [datetime]$ReferenceTime = [datetime]::UtcNow
    )

    # Validate policy up front so errors are surfaced immediately
    Confirm-Policy $Policy

    # Apply all retention policies
    $markedArtifacts = Invoke-RetentionPolicies -Artifacts $Artifacts -Policy $Policy -ReferenceTime $ReferenceTime

    # Build the deletion plan
    $plan = New-DeletionPlan -Artifacts $markedArtifacts

    # Attach the dry-run flag so callers can inspect it
    $plan | Add-Member -NotePropertyName IsDryRun -NotePropertyValue $DryRun -Force

    if (-not $DryRun) {
        # In a real implementation this is where you would call the GitHub API
        # (or another deletion endpoint) for each artifact in $plan.ArtifactsToDelete.
        # For this script the "deletion" is a no-op because all data is mock.
        Write-Verbose "Dry-run is OFF — in a real environment, $($plan.ArtifactsToDelete.Count) artifact(s) would be deleted."
    } else {
        Write-Verbose "Dry-run mode: no artifacts will be deleted."
    }

    return $plan

## Solution Summary

**Files created:**
- `ArtifactCleanup.ps1` — implementation (7 functions)
- `ArtifactCleanup.Tests.ps1` — 22 Pester 5 tests across 7 TDD cycles
- `Run-Tests.ps1` — convenience runner (installs Pester if needed, then runs `Invoke-Pester`)

**TDD Cycles:**

| Cycle | Test Describe block | What it tests |
|-------|---------------------|---------------|
| 1 | `Get-MockArtifacts` | Mock fixture returns valid artifacts with all required fields |
| 2 | `Invoke-MaxAgePolicy` | Marks artifacts older than MaxAgeDays; exact boundary is retained |
| 3 | `Invoke-MaxSizePolicy` | Deletes oldest artifacts until total size ≤ limit; skips pre-marked |
| 4 | `Invoke-KeepLatestNPolicy` | Keeps N newest per workflow, deletes excess |
| 5 | `Invoke-RetentionPolicies` | Chains all three policies in sequence |
| 6 | `New-DeletionPlan` | Produces structured plan with `SpaceReclaimedBytes` and `Summary` |
| 7 | `Invoke-ArtifactCleanup` | Top-level entry: dry-run flag, error on bad policy |

**Key design decisions:**
- `ReferenceTime` parameter on age-based functions makes tests deterministic (no wall-clock drift)
- `ConvertTo-ArtifactObject` normalizes both hashtables and PSCustomObjects, initializing `MarkedForDeletion = $false` and `DeletionReasons = @()`
- All three policies use reference-equality on the same PSCustomObjects (mutations propagate through the pipeline without copying)
- `Confirm-Policy` validates required keys upfront with a descriptive error message
- Dry-run is fully supported — plan is generated but no real deletions occur (a production implementation would call the GitHub API here)

**To run:**
```powershell
Invoke-Pester ./ArtifactCleanup.Tests.ps1 -Output Detailed
# or
pwsh Run-Tests.ps1
```
